steps.title: Count the number of doublings
steps.content: From 1652 to 1952 is $1952-1652=300$ years. With doubling every 75 years, the count is $\tfrac{300}{75}=4$ doublings.

steps.title: Solve for the initial population
steps.content: Let $P_0$ be the 1652 population. Then $P_0\cdot 2^4=160{,}000$. $$P_0=\frac{160{,}000}{16}=10{,}000.$$ The answer is 10000.
